instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, to the saints who are in Ephesus and are faithful in Christ Jesus:
output: Pablo, apóstol de Cristo Jesús por la voluntad de Dios, a los santos que están en Éfeso y que son fieles en Cristo Jesús:

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.
output: Gracia y paz a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre y del Señor Jesucristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who has blessed us with every spiritual blessing in the heavenlies in Christ,
output: Bendito sea el Dios y Padre de nuestro Señor Jesucristo, que nos bendijo con toda bendición espiritual en los lugares celestiales en Cristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as He chose us in Him before the foundation of the world to be holy and without blemish before Him in love,
output: según nos escogió en Él antes de la fundación del mundo, para que fuésemos santos y sin mancha delante de Él en amor,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Predestinating us unto sonship through Jesus Christ to Himself, according to the good pleasure of His will,
output: predestinándonos para filiación por medio de Jesucristo para Sí mismo, según el beneplácito de Su voluntad,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To the praise of the glory of His grace, with which He graced us in the Beloved;
output: para alabanza de la gloria de Su gracia, con la cual nos agració en el Amado;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom we have redemption through His blood, the forgiveness of offenses, according to the riches of His grace,
output: en quien tenemos redención por Su sangre, el perdón de los delitos según las riquezas de Su gracia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which He caused to abound to us in all wisdom and prudence,
output: que hizo sobreabundar para con nosotros en toda sabiduría y prudencia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Making known to us the mystery of His will according to His good pleasure, which He purposed in Himself,
output: dándonos a conocer el misterio de Su voluntad, según Su beneplácito, el cual se había propuesto en Sí mismo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Unto the economy of the fullness of the times, to head up all things in Christ, the things in the heavens and the things on the earth, in Him;
output: para la economía de la plenitud de los tiempos, de hacer que en Cristo sean reunidas bajo una cabeza todas las cosas, así las que están en los cielos, como las que están en la tierra, en Él;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom also we were designated as an inheritance, having been predestinated according to the purpose of the One who works all things according to the counsel of His will,
output: en quien también fuimos designados como herencia, habiendo sido predestinados conforme al propósito del que hace todas las cosas según el consejo de Su voluntad,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That we would be to the praise of His glory who have first hoped in Christ,
output: a fin de que seamos para alabanza de Su gloria, nosotros los que primeramente esperábamos en Cristo.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom you also, having heard the word of the truth, the gospel of your salvation, in Him also believing, you were sealed with the Holy Spirit of the promise,
output: En Él también vosotros, habiendo oído la palabra de la verdad, el evangelio de vuestra salvación, y en Él habiendo creído, fuisteis sellados con el Espíritu Santo de la promesa,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who is the pledge of our inheritance, unto the redemption of the acquired possession, to the praise of His glory.
output: que es las arras de nuestra herencia, hasta la redención de la posesión adquirida, para alabanza de Su gloria.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore I also, having heard of the faith in the Lord Jesus which is among you and your love to all the saints,
output: Por esta causa también yo, habiendo oído de la fe en el Señor Jesús que está entre vosotros, y de vuestro amor para con todos los santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Do not cease giving thanks for you, making mention of you in my prayers,
output: no ceso de dar gracias por vosotros, haciendo mención de vosotros en mis oraciones,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: That the God of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of glory, may give to you a spirit of wisdom and revelation in the full knowledge of Him,
output: para que el Dios de nuestro Señor Jesucristo, el Padre de gloria, os dé espíritu de sabiduría y de revelación en el pleno conocimiento de Él,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The eyes of your heart having been enlightened, that you may know what is the hope of His calling, and what are the riches of the glory of His inheritance in the saints,
output: para que, alumbrados los ojos de vuestro corazón, sepáis cuál es la esperanza a que Él os ha llamado, y cuáles las riquezas de la gloria de Su herencia en los santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And what is the surpassing greatness of His power toward us who believe, according to the operation of the might of His strength,
output: y cuál la supereminente grandeza de Su poder para con nosotros los que creemos, según la operación del poder de Su fuerza,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which He caused to operate in Christ in raising Him from the dead and seating Him at His right hand in the heavenlies,
output: que hizo operar en Cristo, resucitándole de los muertos y sentándole a Su diestra en los lugares celestiales,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Far above all rule and authority and power and lordship and every name that is named not only in this age but also in that which is to come;
output: por encima de todo principado y autoridad y poder y señorío, y sobre todo nombre que se nombra, no sólo en este siglo, sino también en el venidero;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He subjected all things under His feet and gave Him to be Head over all things to the church,
output: y sometió todas las cosas bajo Sus pies, y lo dio por Cabeza sobre todas las cosas a la iglesia,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which is His Body, the fullness of the One who fills all in all.
output: la cual es Su Cuerpo, la plenitud de Aquel que todo lo llena en todo.
